Permission is checked via M:BDMS.Services.IBoreholePermissionService.CanChangeBoreholeStatusAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32}),

Reviewed/Published status.

post.summary: Filters boreholes based on the provided criteria.

requestBody.description: The filter request with filtering criteria.

post.summary:
Computes per-option filter counts under the active filter request,
using filter-exclusion semantics so each dimension's counts predict what
adding that option would yield.

requestBody.description: The active filter request; may be null to compute unconstrained counts.

post.summary:
Returns autocomplete suggestions for a borehole text column. When a
filterRequest is supplied, suggestions are restricted to boreholes
matching every active filter except the filter on the field being autocompleted, so the
user can refine that field's value (filter-exclusion on the self-field).

parameters.name: field
parameters.description: The borehole column to search (originalName, projectName, or name).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The prefix string to match against; must be at least 2 characters.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of suggestions to return (1–50, default 10).

requestBody.description: The active filter request body; may be null/empty to compute suggestions over all boreholes the caller can see.

contents of one of its tabs (currently only the Lithology tab is implemented). Used both by the
"add stratigraphy" action (a single header-only edit) and by the extraction modal that bulk-adds

`mustBeUnique` error.

StratigraphyTabEdit.description:
A single combined edit of a BDMS.Models.StratigraphyTabEdit.Stratigraphy together with the contents of one of its tabs.
Used by the combined stratigraphy create/update endpoints both as the request payload and as the
response, so that the stratigraphy header and the active tab's content are persisted (and returned)
in one transactional command. A header-only edit (e.g. creating an empty stratigraphy) leaves
BDMS.Models.StratigraphyTabEdit.LithologyTab`null`. Only the lithology tab is implemented for now; further tabs
(chronostratigraphy, lithostratigraphy) can add their own slots later.
